# Competitive scoreboard

## Update policy

- **Offline:** Regenerate on PRs that touch load path, COPY, ledger/reuse, bench, or compare harness (`mise run compare-scoreboard`). CI runs `--check`.
- **Cloud / competitor AI:** Competitor AI / warehouse legs are env-gated and budget-capped; not required for PR green.

## Parquet → SQL → PostgreSQL load path (`pg-load-path`)

**Status:** `measured`
**Report:** [`docs/benchmarks/2026-07-12-v1.md`](2026-07-12-v1.md)

Wall time on like-for-like PostgreSQL load is server-dominated; CPU is the clearer differentiator. Machine: Apple M3 laptop — relative evidence, not a cloud SLA.

| System | Metric | Value | Detail |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Pramen → PostgreSQL (binary COPY) | `rows_out_per_s` | 434k–581k | wall 6.9–9.2 s; CPU 1.2–1.4 s; ~0.5 GiB RSS (3 runs) |
| DuckDB → PostgreSQL (postgres extension) | `rows_out_per_s` | 403k–620k | wall tie with Pramen; CPU 6.9–10.9 s; ~45 MiB RSS |
| DataFusion direct (no sink) | `rows_out_per_s` | ~4.0M | engine ceiling for the same SQL; exposes load-path cost |
| DuckDB → native table (no PostgreSQL) | `rows_out_per_s` | ~8.2M | not a PostgreSQL load — cheapest possible destination |

## Binary COPY vs psql text \copy (`psql-copy`)

**Status:** `measured`
**Report:** [`docs/spikes/s1-3-postgres-copy.md`](../spikes/s1-3-postgres-copy.md)

5M rows × 6 columns, PostgreSQL 17, single connection.

| System | Metric | Value | Detail |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Pramen binary COPY encoder | `rows_per_s` | 367000 | 13.6 s wall |
| psql \copy from CSV | `rows_per_s` | 117000 | 42.8 s wall — Pramen 3.1× faster on this fixture |

## Semantic result reuse vs naive re-dispatch (`memoization-reuse`)

**Status:** `measured`
**Report:** [`docs/research/rq2-memoization.md`](../research/rq2-memoization.md)

Offline mock provider + SQLite ledger. Live Bedrock paid-only (ADR 0009); local Ollama frontier substitute in docs/research/local-ollama-frontier.md.

| System | Metric | Value | Detail |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Pramen ledger replay (online) | `reuse_pct` | 100 | 0 provider calls / 0 tokens on replay |
| Pramen batch crash reconcile | `rebill_calls` | 0 | 24/24 rows recovered without re-submit billing |
| Pramen duplicate-heavy (200/20 unique) | `savings_pct_vs_naive` | 90 | vs per-row dispatch with no ledger |
